name: ASUS TUF GAMING A620M-PLUS WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax - BT 5.3
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING A620M-PLUS WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: Gaming-oriented AM5 socket micro-ATX motherboard with DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 6 connectivity.
